description: Fungal infection affecting tomato leaves with concentric brown rings.
treatment: Apply copper-based fungicide and remove infected leaves. Improve air circulation.

description: Serious fungal disease causing diamond-shaped lesions on rice leaves.
treatment: Use resistant varieties. Apply tricyclazole fungicide at early stage.

description: Viral disease transmitted by whiteflies, causing leaf curling and stunting.
treatment: Control whitefly population. Remove infected plants. Use virus-free seeds.

description: Fungal disease producing orange-brown pustules on wheat leaves.
treatment: Apply propiconazole fungicide. Plant rust-resistant wheat varieties.

description: Devastating fungal disease causing dark lesions on leaves and stems.
treatment: Apply mancozeb fungicide preventively. Destroy infected tubers.
